programme.title: Airtime Ep35: Exotic water adventures in Samoa
programme.desc: Exotic adventure and ocean sports come together as five world-class athletes explore Samoa's pristine reef breaks and uncharted waters at the world-famous Salani Surf Resort. Polynesian culture, a perfect waves and Mother Nature create an unforgettable trip.

programme.title: Blue World Ep710: Bahama’s Exuma Islands + Mexico's Reef Sharks
programme.desc: In the Bahama’s Exuma Islands, Blue World films world famous swimming pigs before exploring an underwater cave that vanishes under an island. Then we travel to the waters of Mexico to investigate reef sharks sleeping in caves…unknown to occur anywhere else in the world.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep109: Aquabike World Championships
programme.desc: This Hot Water episode previews the world’s best jetski racers who will compete head-to-head for the prestigious UIM Aquabike World Championship title.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep304: Newfoundland Labrador
programme.desc: Quaint villages, dramatic coastlines and heart stopping encounters with whales by sea kayak–just a taste of what Newfoundland has to offer. There’s no better place to experience the magic of icebergs by sea kayak than the northern tip of Quirpon Island, the northernmost point of Newfoundland and Labrador.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep101 Sumbawa, Indonesia
programme.desc: Join World Champion surfers Mick Fanning, Stephanie Gilmore and Mark Occhilupo as they adventure through Indonesia’s Sumbawa area of Lakey Peak with surfers Bede Durbidge, Ozzie Wright and Mikala Jones. These world-class athletes surf perfect waves while relishing all that the Surfing Lifestyle has to offer.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep114: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Airtime Ep35: Exotic water adventures in Samoa

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep101
programme.desc: Liquid Edge kayaks the insane whitewaters of Canada’s Stikine Canyon, flies above a boat with the water powered Jet Lev system, goes behind the scenes of Oakley’s Wave of the Winter featuring World Champion surfer Kelly Slater, and delves deep into a surf barrel via GoPro’s Ride of The Winter.

programme.desc: Flipside is the show that takes you behind the scenes with Absinthe Films during the making of our latest snowboard movie - NowHere. programme.title: Perspektiv
programme.desc: David Carrier-Porcheron is a titan in the snowboarding community. When the COVID-19 pandemic hit, DCP and family were left stranded in Costa Rica. programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Winter Leisure

programme.title: Mission Antarctic

Xavier de le Rue and Lucas DeBari set out from the Falklands on a 20-meter sailboat, navigating the Drake Passage to explore the Antarctic Peninsula. Awarded ‘Best Freeride Movie’ at the 2013 International Freeride Film Festival.

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to episode 3 of The Polo Show. This time we travel to the home of polo for a special look at the iconic English season. Set within the land of the rolling green fields with sports running through its heart amongst castles and history there is no better place for the home of polo to be.

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: This is episode 4 of The Polo Show. We take a look back at the highlights from some of the most prestigious polo tournaments that dominated the European circuit this summer. We will enjoy of olympic history in Berlin with the German Open, horseriding in the beautiful beach or enjoying the French Riviera at the exclusive Saint-Tropez Polo Club in this episode. Come for a ride with us!

programme.title: The Dutch Masters 2021 Highlights
programme.desc: As the largest indoor show in the Netherlands, The Dutch Masters (Indoor Brabant Horse Show) has already stood for top-class equestrian sport for half a century. Together with the CHI Genève, CSIO Spruce Meadows Masters and the CHIO Aachen, the Dutch Masters is one of the four top events of the respected Rolex Grand Slam. The best riders in the world meet up every year in March in a bid to ride to victory in the legendary Brabanthallen. The first World Cup Final of showjumping was staged in this venue for the first time in 1994, and since prestigious competitions and more finals have taken place in one of the four pillars of showjumping and dressage. Intense competitions meet exquisite entertainment amid the unique atmosphere of the Dutch Masters. You can now watch the highlights of the competition on Horse TV.

programme.title: Dubai Polo Gold Cup - Final
programme.desc: The world's best polo teams meet at the Dubai Polo Gold Cup competition. After days of competition, UAE and AM are the two lasting teams who will dispute the most important Polo tournament in Asia and the Middle East. They will have to show a combination of equestrian pursuits, skills and team effort to win. Relive the 2020 final between UAE vs. AM.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - Week 5
programme.desc: The fifth week of the Sunshine Tour 2020 is running short due to the COVID-19 pandemic, but the exciting past weeks of the competition are not over until the Suzuki Grand Prix is disputed. In the last day of the XXVI Sunshine Tour, both riders and horses enjoyed a wonderful competition, and the best riders have made it to the jumpoff. Enjoy the best moments of the fifth week of the Sunshine Tour, on HorseTV.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Stories from the Stud
programme.desc: This week Ride seeks out the scorching sands of Kuwait where the Arabian Horse reigns supreme, skims the surf on the Emerald Isle with the Connemara Ponies of Cashel Bay Stud and recognises the dressage stars of the future at the home of Germany’s Olympic Gold Medalist Sonke Rothenberger.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Horses Heritage
programme.desc: This week Ride travels back in time on the UK’s waterways aboard one of the last remaining horse drawn Barges. We fly high in California with Karrie Rufer, star of the Longines FEI Jumping World Cup North American League, step out with the sure-footed shires as they “Relay” acrross rural England, and witness the spectacle that is the dancing Spanish stallions at the Royal Andalusian School in Jerez.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 5 - Saint Tropez
programme.desc: We move on to sunny Saint Tropez to celebrate the fifth leg of the Longines Global Champions Tour 2022. Young talent Gilles Thomas has moved his way to second place in the standings, but Pieter Devos counts with years of experience and will not give up his first position so easily. Who will win Saint Tropez's GP?

programme.title: time2Rlx - Nature Walks
programme.desc: Experience the beauty and serenity of Hawaii’s Tropical Botanical Garden. Enjoy the sights and sounds of tropical flora, birds, and gentle streams, offering a perfect escape into nature.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Wildlife
programme.desc: Journey through Botswana’s stunning wilderness, watching lions dominate the savannah, giraffes grazing, elephants bathing in the Chobe River, and colorful birds filling the skies.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Explore the vibrant underwater world of the Red Sea, where cheerful fish, beautiful coral reefs, and the remains of a sunken ship await. Enjoy a calming virtual dive experience with soothing music and underwater sounds to help you relax and unwind.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Mercedes‘ S-Class Coupe is a real masterpiece. We explored what the S 63 AMG Coupe has to offer in comparison to the Bentley Continental and the Rolls Royce Wraith.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Volvo S90 offers Scandinavian elegance and a high level of security features. Jaguar entered the race with its performance sedan XF-S and Cadillac ramped up their luxury level with the CT6.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The BMW M3 and the Mercedes-AMG C63, the top models of the two iconic manufacturers, are in eternal competition. With the Lexus RC F, a competitor from Japan is lurking. Is the Japanese exotic a threat to the German competition?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Swiss tuning company O.CT turned the Lamborghini Huracan into an even more furious beast. Also: the Cadillac CTS-V looks like a regular limousine, but at a second glance it reveals its monstrous power.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Bentayga, Bentley introduced the first SUV in the brand's 100-year history. Range Rover took a different approach with the Evoque Cabriolet: they offered a convertible option for their SUV model. And: the Mercedes AMG GLE coupe.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Even though the Mercedes-AMG A45 Performmaster has just four cylinders, its sound is similar to its V8-colleagues by AMG. Also: the car tuning company MTM offers a similarly powerful alternative, based on an Audi: the RS3 R.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Audi RS7 Performance's V8 engine propels this limousine to a top speed of more than 300 km/h. Also: the Maserati Ghibli combines Italian elegance with impressive performance. And: a look at the second generation Porsche Panamera.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Volvo S90 offers Scandinavian elegance and a high level of security features. Jaguar entered the race with its performance sedan XF-S and Cadillac ramped up their luxury level with the CT6.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tesla Model S was the world's first premium sedan that was developed from scratch as an electric car. Tesla showed the world that electromobility can be sexy and that it works. We took a closer look at the Model S P85D.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Bloody Streetz
programme.desc: Bloody Streetz is the story of what happens when a ruthless killer for hire runs up against an African spirit and is forced to learn the errors of his ways.

programme.title: Breakdown Lane
programme.desc: When Kirby's SUV stalls in the desert, she must overcome the elements and the lurking undead to get home. Her only companion is Max, the Emergency Car Service Rep trapped in his office by the zombies.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: A black white, film noir fashioned as a 40's gangster movie adaption from the classic Shakespearean stage-play 'Julius Caesar'.

programme.title: City of Vultures 2
programme.desc: A gangster makes moves to take over the Southside of Chicago, but the police are closing in as street violence escalates to devastating levels.

programme.title: City of Vultures 3
programme.desc: Richard joins in the drug trade, as advocates for reform urge him to change. G attempts to raise his son on Chicago's violent south side.

programme.title: Pillow Party Massacre
programme.desc: Haunted by a prank gone fatally wrong, five friends reunite to heal. But not all can forget, and it's clear that someone or something is out for revenge.

programme.title: Weekend Killer
programme.desc: Detective's Joey Moretti and Patricia Stevens are trying to track down a serial killer that preys on young attractive women, leaving only cryptic messages carved into their flesh as clues! Joey struggles to keep himself together as the investigation leads him closer and closer to the deranged killer!

programme.title: The Faith Community
programme.desc: A group of religious students drive into the remote wilderness to spend time with a religious sect and strengthen their bond with God. The three unsuspecting students film everything to document their experience but soon find themselves in the dark.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E03 - Dropped And Dragging
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer, two brothers, set off on another adventure in the wilds of Alaska. They're exploring a river system that hasn't been hunted in over ten years because of predators. The journey begins slowly, with the brothers spending more time dragging their gear than floating, in a place teeming with grizzlies.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E04 - Death In The Water
programme.desc: The search for a mature moose begins as brothers Chris and Casey Keefer move their way downriver, but when they cross paths with a giant sow grizzly, they get way more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E05 - Rising Waters
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer keep heading downriver, and as the moose rut draws nearer, they have to rely more on catching fish, hunting ducks, and gathering berries. A massive Alaskan rainstorm hits, bringing big challenges for their success.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E01 - Rules of the Realm
programme.desc: Animals or groups protect their territory by using sounds like birds singing or scents like pheromones from many mammals to mark boundaries. These are just the initial warnings. If other animals ignore these signs, a conflict might happen. Animals need a secure territory to mate, raise their young, and ensure there's enough food and resources for survival. This episode looks at the strategies animals use to claim their territory.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E02 - Nature's World Wide Web
programme.desc: When animals share info to help each other decide, it's called animal communication. They use stuff like sounds, colors, body language, movements, electric signs, touches, smells, or a mix of these. Whether it's a sea anemone spreading its tentacles or a male lion considering approaching a mate, their skill in communicating can be vital for their success. This episode dives into how animals interact with one another.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E06 - ATV Accidents
programme.desc: Laura and Nick rig up some dramatic, high-speed tests of ATVs to see how accidents happen and what to do to protect from harm.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E07 - Treestand Accidents
programme.desc: Exploring why treestand accidents happen and how to prevent them.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E08 - Surviving Nature's Fury

Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.desc: Sebastían returns as a priest and this disappoints Amelia. Camila insists that Rosa Blanco can be her mother, but Max does not want her to get her hopes up so that she does not suffer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max busca noticias sobre Rosa Blanco; la Madre Isabel le confiesa al Padre Tiziano que ya Camila conoce el nombre de su mamá. Camila descubre a Max en un beso con Astrid. Familias en guerra.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Piensan que es Rosa Blanco quien desató la guerra entre las familias. La Madre Isabel piensa comunicar la noticia a Camila que cree que ella es su madre. Ezequiel y Fausto armados, se enfrentan.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila va a encontrarse con una de las Rosas Blanco para saber algo más sobre la niña de la foto que era ella pequeña y el destino de su madre. Está decepcionada porque la mujer no conoce nada y esto la pone triste.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Hay química entre Camila y Max. Explosión en Mascarada. Max y Ezequiel a punto de enfrentarse por Camila. Ella siempre pensando que a su Mamá la envuelve un misterio.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Una nerviosa reunión entre Ezequiel y la Madre Isabel intriga a Camila. Max apoya a Camila en su trabajo y le ofrece ayudar en la búsqueda de su madre.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila quiere saber qué hace la Madre Isabel en casa de Elda y le dicen que es ayudar para el orfanato. Camila y Yeli están en la vereda donde la mamá de Camila la abandonó de 5 años asustada y llorosa.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Canon: Fidelidad al Límite
programme.desc: Mariana de 35 años, es una arquitecta que trabaja y es socia de un importante despacho de arquitectos, está casada con Julián de 40 años, quien es corresponsal de guerra. Está enamorados, felices, con relación sexual cotidiana. Son padre de dos hijos de 14 y 17 año. En el juego sexual, Julián menciona que no le importaría la infidelidad a condición de estar enterado del hecho con detalles.

programme.title: Bendita Calamidad
programme.desc: Los hermanos Fayos, Anselmo y Ricardo, están con el agua al cuello. Su bar no funciona, el Ayuntamiento lo clausura y se ha agotado el dinero que, para ir tirando, solicitaron a unos prestamistas que no se andan con contemplaciones a la hora de cobrar. Piden consejo a un abogado poco amigo de la ley, Antonio Orestes, que les sugiere una vía rápida para acabar con sus problemas: El secuestro exprés de un constructor de Tarazona.

programme.title: Aerosol
programme.desc: El líder de una banda mexicana mata a un oponente en la guerra de pandillas en los 80's, por lo que huye a la ciudad de Los Ángeles, California. Dieciocho años después regresa al barrio sin un objetivo definido, sólo para encontrar a su hermano menor, involucrado en las pandillas de hoy. El crimen organizado utiliza niños para distribuir droga en los barrios. En combatir la corrupción y el crimen que hay en el barrio, Nuk encuentra un significado para su retorno y un camino para redimir las muertes que causó

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.
